response.overview: After returning from a long motorcycle trip, a man named Ace finds his local area gripped by the fear of a serial killer. His exhaustion quickly shifts to terror when he discovers bruises on his knuckles he doesn't remember getting, leading to a series of unsettling events.  The story follows Ace as he confronts a nightmarish figure caught on his CCTV, forcing him to question his own surroundings and sanity.
response.tagline: WHEN A KILLER WEARS YOUR SHADOW, THE ONLY WAY OUT IS TO HUNT YOURSELF.
response.title: Dissociation
